content.text:
Read HEARTBEAT.md if it exists (workspace context). Follow it strictly. Do not infer or repeat old tasks from prior chats. If nothing needs attention, reply HEARTBEAT_OK.
When reading HEARTBEAT.md, use workspace file C:/Users/admin/.openclaw/workspace/HEARTBEAT.md (exact case). Do not read docs/heartbeat.md.
Current time: Monday, March 30th, 2026 — 4:02 AM (Asia/Bangkok) / 2026-03-29 21:02 UTC

# HEARTBEAT.md

## Periodic Tasks

### 📋 Weekly Conversation Stats (Monday)
- If today is Monday: read `memory/conversations/YYYY-MM.md` for the current month
- Summarize in daily memory `memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`:
  - Total conversations last week
  - Top 3 most common issues
  - Count of ⚠️ new questions not in skill
  - Count of ❌/⏳ unresolved cases
- If there are many ⚠️ new questions → notify admin Anh Phi to update `interlink-support` skill

### 📄 Whitepaper Sync Health Check (Daily)
- Check `memory/whitepaper-data.md` → verify "Last synced" date is today or yesterday
- If last sync is older than 2 days → cron job may have failed → log warning in daily memory
- If whitepaper content has major changes → notify admin

# Conversation Logs — 2026-03

### [20:17] @hohuong19 — Interlink FAQ and account/wallet issues

- **Vấn đề**: User hỏi nhiều câu về Interlink gồm đăng ký, ID, quên passcode/ID, đổi/xóa account, verify face, ITLG giảm, listing, ambassador, referral code, group mining, recover ITLG, OTP, wallet recovery và swap.
- **Phân loại**: Other
- **Mã lỗi**: S01 / S02 / S04 / M02 / O01
- **Ngôn ngữ**: EN
- **Đã giải quyết**: ✅ Có
- **Tóm tắt trao đổi**:
  - User: Hỏi cách signup, ID là gì, mục đích app là gì, cách lấy thêm ITLG, referral code ở đâu, group mining là gì.
  - Bot: Hướng dẫn đăng ký, giải thích ID/login, mô tả công dụng app, cách tăng ITLG, và chỉ vị trí Human Hash/referral.
  - User: Báo face verification fail, muốn xóa/đổi account, quên passcode/ID, supporter không hiện, OTP không nhận.
  - Bot: Giải thích face có thể trùng account cũ, thông báo không hỗ trợ xóa/đổi ID/email, hướng dẫn Forgot Passcode/Forgot Login ID, kiểm tra spam hoặc chờ Telegram OTP 15–30 phút.
  - User: Báo coin giảm 440, hỏi recover ITLG, streak không complete, mining giảm 50%.
  - Bot: Giải thích cơ chế burn/recovery, streak reset nếu lỡ session, và giảm 50% để chống lạm phát.
  - User: Hỏi về ví: quên seedphrase/private key, không login wallet, không swap.
  - Bot: Trả lời không thể khôi phục ví nếu mất seedphrase/private key; yêu cầu screenshot/video + wallet address để kiểm tra lỗi login/swap.
  - User: Cảm ơn.
- **Ghi chú**: User hỏi dồn nhiều FAQ ngắn; có lúc không hài lòng về hệ thống session. Không ghi thông tin nhạy cảm.

---

# InterLink Whitepaper Data

> Last synced: 2026-03-28 11:00 UTC+7
> Source: https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai

---

## Tokenomics Overview

InterLink Token is the native digital asset of the InterLink Network — designed to become the most widely distributed and human-owned token in the world.

Unlike traditional cryptocurrencies — and even Bitcoin, which favors those with early capital or mining hardware — InterLink Token is earned exclusively by real, verified humans through proof of personhood. One person, one node, one opportunity to participate. No rigs, no bots, no manipulation.

Where Bitcoin proves computational power, InterLink Token proves humanity.

Vision: onboard 1 billion real people → become the most decentralized cryptocurrency in terms of human distribution — powering governance, applications, and the on-chain reputation economy.

---

## InterLink Token And InterLink Genesis

The InterLink Token ($ITL) and InterLink Genesis ($ITLG) models are inspired by Bitcoin and Ethereum, respectively.

- **$ITL** serves as a reserve asset for businesses and stakeholders — primarily used for staking to access the InterLink Human Layer.
- **$ITLG** functions as the utility token within the broader InterLink ecosystem.

---

## InterLink Token ($ITL)

**Token of Trust & Institutional Alignment in InterLink**

### 💠 What is $ITL?
$ITL is designed to embody institutional alignment and long-term credibility within the InterLink ecosystem. It plays a critical role in enabling structured, reliable access to the Human Layer — a global network of verified, bot-resistant users.

### 🏛️ Held by
- Venture Capital Firms
- Institutional Players
- Ecosystem Partners
- Human Nodes committed to InterLink's long-term vision

Together, these holders signal trust, stability, and alignment with the network's governance and direction.

### 🔧 Utility
1. **Staking for Access to the Human Layer**: Partners, platforms, and protocols must stake $ITL to integrate and interact with verified human users — ensuring a trusted foundation for apps, rewards, and governance.
2. **Foundation Reserve & Coordination Layer**: $ITL is used by the InterLink Foundation as part of its strategic reserve, aligning incentives across stakeholders and supporting ecosystem-level decisions.

---

## InterLink Genesis Token ($ITLG)

**The token designed to sustain the network and power the entire ecosystem.**

### 💠 What is $ITLG?
$ITLG represents the active participation of real humans in the InterLink network. Minted through human verification and activity, $ITLG powers core engagement, governance, and utility within the Human Network.

### 🏛️ Held by
- **Human Nodes & Miners**: Verified users who contribute to the network by participating, verifying, referring, and engaging in applications within the InterLink ecosystem.

### 🔧 Utility
1. **DAO Voting Power**: $ITLG holders vote on key ecosystem proposals, enabling bottom-up governance driven by verified human participants.
2. **Ecosystem Incentives**: Receive token incentives from projects building on the Human Network — proportional to $ITLG holdings and participation level.
3. **Early Access to Launchpads**: Priority allocation and whitelist access for new project launches within the InterLink ecosystem.
4. **Payment in Mini-App Ecosystem**: Spendable within games, apps, and services running on InterLink — acting as the primary medium of exchange for on-chain utilities.

### 📊 Allocation
Long-term goal: 1 billion users. Once $ITLG reaches max supply, InterLink DAO vote by $ITLG holders will determine whether to maintain fixed supply (scarcity) or increase supply strategically to attract more Human Nodes and strengthen the overall value.

---

## ITL - The Human Currency of Global Payments

$ITL is the first digital currency designed for direct, peer-to-peer payments between verified humans — without the need for banks, governments, or intermediaries.

It enables anyone with a phone and a face to earn, hold, and transfer value globally — bot-free, permissionless, and borderless.

### 🌐 Why the World Needs $ITL
Over 1.4 billion adults remain unbanked (World Bank, 2021). They lack:
- Formal financial institutions
- National identity documents
- Access to global payment systems
- Inclusion in digital labor, education, or healthcare

Yet most own smartphones, connect to the internet, and are ready to contribute.

### 🌍 Real Use Cases
1. **Humanitarian Aid**: NGOs can transfer $ITL directly to verified individuals in disaster zones — eliminating delays, fraud, and leakage.
2. **Cross-Border Health & Education**: Organizations like WHO or UNICEF can issue micro-grants, medical subsidies, or digital education credits — directly to verified users.
3. **AI Training at Global Scale**: Big tech companies like Google, Meta, and Microsoft need vast amounts of real human data to train AI systems. $ITL enables them to compensate verified users directly for contributing high-quality, ethically sourced data.

---

## Token Mining Mechanism and Sustainability

In the early stages, mining is designed to be accessible and straightforward → encourages mass adoption, rapid onboarding, and strengthening the human node network.

### Key Mechanisms
1. **Balanced Reward Structure**: New users are not left too far behind in token acquisition, while early adopters maintain strong incentives to continue mining actively.
2. **Anti-Bot Protection**: Real human verification through InterLink ID → bot activities fully mitigated → only genuine users participate in mining rewards.
3. **Token Locking Mechanism**: A proportion of mined tokens is subject to strategic vesting and locking schedules → healthy token supply-demand balance → prevents excessive immediate circulation.
4. **Equitable Profit Opportunities**: Both small and large token holders can achieve favorable returns without disproportionately affecting the overall token price.

InterLink's architecture guarantees that token inflation is tightly controlled through real human verification, vesting mechanisms, and a carefully calibrated reward model.

**Mining accessibility today, sustainable value for tomorrow.**

---

## FAQ (from Whitepaper)

### Q: When will the token be listed on an exchange? What will the TGE look like?
The current plan is to list the token toward the end of 2025 or early 2026. However, now that we have the InterLink DAO, all major decisions will be made transparently with the community. The final decision will be made through a vote by $ITLG holders.

For TGE: the system will calculate the token unlock schedule based on a linear relationship with the number of tokens held — with a maximum vesting period of up to 180 months. The more tokens one holds, the longer the lock-up period, ensuring price stability and sustainable growth.

### Q: Will the token face excessive inflation? Are there still more halving events planned?
The token will be burned and used as a medium of exchange throughout the entire ecosystem. Additionally, bots and farmers have been completely eliminated. Halving events will continue — potentially up to 100 times — to ensure consistent reduction in emissions and long-term value preservation.

### Q: Does the dual-token model ($ITL and $ITLG) risk diluting overall value?
No — the dual-token model was carefully designed to separate governance, utility, and strategic functions:
- **$ITLG**: Genesis token, earned exclusively through mining by verified humans. Governs InterLink DAO. Critical role in expanding the human network + future decentralized payment layer.
- **$ITL**: Core utility and strategic token, structured for integration with ecosystem partners, institutions, and large-scale capital. Aligned with future public offerings or stock listings — regulatory-friendly, institution-ready model.

### Q: What will the $ITLG token price be at listing?
InterLink has its own internal formula to determine a fair valuation — directly proportional to the number of users in the network.

### Q: Why was ITLG initially said to be 10 billion? Did you increase the supply?
No. The total supply of InterLink Token ($ITL) has always been fixed at 10 billion and has never changed. $ITLG supply was also transparently shared from the beginning with partners, investors, and ecosystem stakeholders including Google, AWS, NIST, and NYSE-aligned institutions.

---

## Links

- Full whitepaper: https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai
- Tokenomics intro: https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai/interlink-tokenomics/introducing
- $ITL & $ITLG overview: https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai/interlink-token-and-interlink-genesis
- $ITL page: https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai/interlink-token-usditl
- $ITLG page: https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai/interlink-genesis-token-usditlg
- ITL Human Currency: https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai/itl-the-human-currency-of-global-payments
- FAQ: https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai/faq
- Mining mechanism: https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai/token-mining-mechanism-and-sustainability

# Daily Memory — 2026-03-30

## Heartbeat

### Weekly Conversation Stats (covering last week)
- Total conversations last week: 1
- Top 3 most common issues:
  1. Account access and recovery questions (signup, login ID, forgot passcode, OTP)
  2. Wallet issues (wallet login, swap problems, seed phrase/private key recovery limits)
  3. Token/mining questions (ITLG decrease, burn/recovery, streak reset, mining rate reduction)
- Count of ⚠️ new questions not in skill: 0
- Count of ❌/⏳ unresolved cases: 0
- Notes: One multi-topic support conversation was logged this month so far, and it was marked resolved.

### Whitepaper Sync Health Check

- Status: OK — sync is from yesterday relative to current heartbeat time, so no cron warning needed.
